scripts.dev: concurrently -n gateway,auth,property,operations,booking,community,notification -c blue,green,yellow,magenta,cyan,red,white "npm run dev -w @rgh/api-gateway" "npm run dev -w @rgh/auth-service" "npm run dev -w @rgh/property-service" "npm run dev -w @rgh/operations-service" "npm run dev -w @rgh/booking-service" "npm run dev -w @rgh/community-service" "npm run dev -w @rgh/notification-service"
scripts.db:sync: npm run db:sync -w @rgh/auth-service && npm run db:sync -w @rgh/property-service && npm run db:sync -w @rgh/operations-service && npm run db:sync -w @rgh/booking-service && npm run db:sync -w @rgh/community-service && npm run db:sync -w @rgh/notification-service
